message:
test: wave 13 – 90 new data-type tests across 4 modules

grpc/status.rs: 19 new (Code Display/Default/Hash/Copy/as_i32/from_i32 all
  variants, Status Debug/Clone/Display/Error/convenience ctors/From<io::Error>,
  GrpcError Display all/Debug/Error/into_status all/From conversions)
messaging/kafka.rs: 25 new (KafkaError Display all/Debug/source, Compression
  Default/Copy/Eq/all-ne, Acks Default/Copy/as_i16, ProducerConfig defaults/
  Debug/Clone/builder/validate edge cases, RecordMetadata/KafkaProducer/
  TransactionalConfig/TransactionalProducer Debug/Clone/accessors)
messaging/jetstream.rs: 24 new (JsError Display all/Debug/source/From,
  RetentionPolicy/StorageType/DiscardPolicy/DeliverPolicy/AckPolicy
  Default/Debug/Copy/Eq, StreamConfig Debug/Clone/new/builder, ConsumerConfig
  Debug/Clone/new/ephemeral/builder, StreamState Default/Debug, PubAck/
  StreamInfo Debug/Clone)
messaging/redis.rs: 22 new (RedisError Display all/Debug/source/From,
  RespValue encode Error/null-bulk/null-array/empty-array/neg-int/zero-int/
  Debug/Clone/Eq/ne/as_bytes/as_integer/is_ok, decode error/null-bulk/
  null-array/unknown-type, RedisConfig Default/Debug-redact/Clone/from_url
  variants, encode_into reuse)

Session cumulative: 314 new tests committed (waves 9-13).
